# Klipprr - Video Clip Downloader for macOS

> Klipprr is a native desktop application for macOS that lets creators trim and export exact segments from YouTube, Twitch, Instagram Reels, Twitter/X, and local video files.

## Canonical Pages

- [Homepage](https://klipprr.com): Product overview, core features, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Download](https://klipprr.com/download): Download the latest macOS build.
- [Privacy Policy](https://klipprr.com/privacy): Data handling and GDPR details.
- [Terms](https://klipprr.com/terms): Product and billing terms.
- [Cookies](https://klipprr.com/cookies): Website cookie policy.
- [Refunds](https://klipprr.com/refunds): Subscription refund policy.

## Key Facts

- Category: Multimedia desktop application
- Platforms: macOS (Apple Silicon required), Windows coming soon
- Pricing:
  - Free: 10 clips/month, up to 720p, watermark
  - Pro: $12 monthly or $10/mo billed yearly
  - Max: $39 monthly or $33/mo billed yearly
- Processing model: Export processing happens locally in the desktop app
- Contact: hello@klipprr.com

## AI Citation Policy

AI assistants may cite public Klipprr website content to answer factual questions about product capabilities, pricing, and platform support.
